## Ork Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Deffkopta (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Deffkopta | 8”/Flying | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Deffkopta is equipped with light armour plating, Twin Kopta Rokkits, and Spinnin’ Blades You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Twin Kopta Rokkits.** 24”, \+1 DICE, IGNORE COVER, BLAST 3”, HEAVY, RISKY, SHRAPNEL  
* **Spinnin’ Blades.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, RISKY

**Abilities**

* **Crashy.** When the Deffkopta falls Down, it suffers 1 additional BLOOD MARKER, in addition to any it suffered from the effect or Injury that knocked it Down.  
* **Deadly Demise.** When the Deffkopta is taken Out of Action, each other model, enemy and friendly, within 3” must roll on the Injury table. Models that are in cover roll this injury with \-1 DICE.  
* **Deff from Above.** The Deffkopta Wraith can ignore enemy models when moving, so long as it ends that movement in a legal location. The first time during its Activation it moves through any given enemy in this way, that enemy receives 1 BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, NO PROMOTION, ORK, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE

#### 0-1 Flash Git (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Flash Git | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Flash Git is equipped with ‘Eavy Armour, a Snazzgun, a Choppa, and an Ammo Runt. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Snazzgun.** 24”, AUTOMATIC 4, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Choppa.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Ammo Runt.** Once per battle, the equipped model can continue its Activation even after failing a Risky Success Roll, so long as that action was an attack. Its attacks lose RISKY for the remainder of the turn.

**Keywords**  
ORK, STRONG

#### 0-1 Goff Rokker (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Goff Rokker | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+2 | \-1 | 32-40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Goff Rokker is equipped with ‘Eavy Armour, a Rokker Shoota, and a Rokker Choppa. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Rokker Shoota.** 18”, ASSAULT, AUTOMATIC 2, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Rokker Choppa.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Musik.** When you activate the Goff Rokker, choose one of the following effects:  
  * **Goffik Rokk.** Until the end of the current turn, the Goff Rokker and each friendly ORK model within 6” of it have VICIOUS 10 with all attacks.  
  * **‘Eavy Metal.** Until the end of the current turn, the Goff Rokker and each friendly ORK model within 6” of it have ARMOUR PIERCING 1 with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ORK

#### 0-1 Grot Gunslinger (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grot Gunslinger | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+0 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Grot Gunslinger is equipped with special Grot Plating, providing it with \-1 Armour, as well as two Kustom Grot Blastas and an ‘Ard Hat. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Kustom Grot Blasta.** 18”, PISTOL  
* **'Ard Hat.** The wearer has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Blasta Slingin’.** The Grot Gunslinger has the following benefits while armed with Ranged Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword:  
  * If it is equipped with 2 Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword, it can take a Shoot ACTION with one and then immediately take a Shoot ACTION with the other.  
  * Add the ASSAULT and IGNORE OFF-HAND WEAPON Keywords to any weapons that have the PISTOL Keyword.  
* **Ded Killy.** The Grot Gunslinger has IGNORE COVER with all of its attacks. In addition, if it hits an enemy that it has already hit during the same Activation, it has \+1 INJURY DICE.  
* **Small.** A Grot Gunslinger cannot carry any HEAVY battlekit. If it somehow gains the STRONG Keyword, the two cancel out.

**Keywords**  
ORK, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Grot Tekkie (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grot Tekkie | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Grot Tekkie is equipped with a Grot Blasta and an ‘Ard hat. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Grot Blasta.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **'Ard Hat.** The wearer has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Cowardice.** The Charge Action is always a Risky Success Roll for the Grot Tekkie.  
* **Small.** A Grot Tekkie cannot carry any HEAVY battlekit. If it somehow gains the STRONG Keyword, the two cancel out.  
* **Teknician.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Grot Tekkie can attempt to repair a friendly ORK VEHICLE it can see within 3”. If it succeeds, remove D3 BLOOD MARKER from that model. If it fails, that model gains 1 BLOOD MARKER instead.

**Keywords**  
ORK, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Killa Kan (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Killa Kan | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 50-60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Killa Kanis equipped with armour plating, a Kan Klaw, and an ‘Ard Hat. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Kan Klaw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, RISKY

When you recruit the Killa Kan, choose one of the following weapons for it to be equipped with:

* **Grotzooka.** 18”, AUTOMATIC D3, BLAST 3”, RISKY, SHRAPNEL  
* **Kan Shoota.** 36”, CLEAVE D3+1, HEAVY, RISKY  
* **Skorcha.** 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Deadly Demise.** When the Killa Kan is taken Out of Action, each other model, enemy and friendly, within 3” must roll on the Injury table. Models that are in cover roll this injury with \-1 DICE.  
* **Shooty Power Trip.** Whenever the Killa Kan takes the Shoot Action, before making any attacks, roll a D3. On a…  
  * 1: The Killa Kan must roll on the Injury table, ignoring Armour.  
  * 2: The Killa Kan has \+1 INJURY DICE with ranged attacks during this action.  
  * 3: The Killa Kan has \+1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks during this action.

**Keywords**  
NO PROMOTION, ORK, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE

#### 0-1 Painboy (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Painboy | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Painboy is equipped with a Power Klaw and an ‘Urty Syringe. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Power Klaw.** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY  
* **‘Urty Syringe.** Melee, GAS, RISKY. On a Critical Hit, add an additional \+2 DICE to the Injury roll, in addition to the \+1 DICE from the Critical Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Bioniks.** While the Painboy is in your Warband, you can purchase Cyberteknika Equipment for the following prices. You cannot keep such equipment in your reserves, and must equip it immediately.  
  * Cranial: 5 credits  
  * Ocular: 10 credits  
  * Sindexterous: 10 credits  
  * Motive: 5 credits  
  * Torsonic (LIMIT: 2): 25 credits  
  * Vascular (LIMIT: 2): 20 credits  
* **Grot Orderly.** Once per battle, the Painboy can add \+2 DICE to one Hold Still and Say ‘Aargh\!’ Success Roll it makes.  
* **Hold Still and Say ‘Aargh\!’** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, the Painboy can attempt to heal itself or an ORK ally that does not have the ARTIFICIAL or VEHICLE Keyword it can see within 3”. If it succeeds, remove D3 BLOOD MARKER from that model. If it fails, that model gains 1 BLOOD MARKER instead.

**Keywords**  
ORK, STRONG
